name: Homemade Chips, Lo Cal, Lo Fat.
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 500°F.
2 Lightly spray cookie sheet with vegetable cooking spray.
3 Slice unpeeled baking potato into very thin slices.
4 In a bowl, toss potato slices with dressing until evenly coated.
5 Arrange potatoes in a single layer on cookie sheet.
6 Bake for about 20 minutes or until lightly browned on both sides, turning once after 10 minutes.
